text: *Fictional interview dataset for evaluation purposes only\.*
Identity: Passport valid; bank statement dated 2026\-01\-15\.
Right to work: Not applicable \- contractor via UK limited company noted by recruiter\.
Employment history: Corporate contractor documentation covers prior engagements\.
Criminality/basic disclosure: Not mandatory for CONTRACTOR\-LTD role per policy\.
Right\-to\-work still requires evidence of individual work eligibility where personally providing services in UK\. Recruiter note may be insufficient\.
